title: Riverbed Memory Index Schema
description: Schema for .river/memory/index.json written by src/lib/riverbed-memory.mjs. v1 stores full entries inline (not references to separate JSON files).

version.description: Index schema version. Currently fixed at "1".

generatedAt.description: Optional timestamp when this index was last generated/written.

entries.description: Full entry objects conforming to riverbed-entry.schema.json, stored inline.
